scripts.ci-build: npm i -g wasm-pack && npm run build-all
scripts.build-all: npm run build-wasm && npm run build-lib
scripts.build-wasm: cd ../rooc && wasm-pack test --node && wasm-pack build --out-dir ../ts-lib/src/pkg --out-name rooc
scripts.build-wasm:debug: cd ../rooc && wasm-pack build --dev --out-dir ../ts-lib/src/pkg --out-name rooc && cd ../ts-lib && npm run build-source-map
scripts.build-wasm:test: cd ../rooc && wasm-pack build --dev --out-dir ../ts-lib/src/pkg --out-name rooc && wasm-pack build --dev --target nodejs --out-dir ../ts-lib/.test-pkg --out-name rooc
scripts.test: npm run build-wasm:test && npm run test:types && vitest run
